Package cc.quaternion.potshaper

Class PotMaster

java.lang.Object
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotMaster
public class PotMaster extends Object
Represents a slide master within a presentation, providing access to layouts, theme properties, and visual elements.

A slide master defines the overall design template for a presentation, including background styles, color schemes, font families, and placeholder arrangements. All slide layouts are derived from a master, ensuring visual consistency across slides. This class wraps the underlying Apache POI XSLFSlideMaster to offer a more convenient and type-safe API for accessing and manipulating master-level properties.

Usage Example


 List<PotMaster> masters = ppt.getMasters();
 PotMaster master = masters.get(0);
 System.out.println("Master name: " + master.getName());

Layout Access Example


 List<PotLayout> layouts = master.getLayouts();
 for (PotLayout layout : layouts) {
     System.out.println("Layout: " + layout.getName());
 }

 // Retrieve a specific layout by name
 PotLayout titleLayout = master.getLayout("Title Slide");
Since:
1.0
Author:
Quaternion8192

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the display name of this master, typically derived from its theme.

      The name is obtained from the associated XSLFTheme. If the theme is unavailable or an error occurs, the string "Unknown" is returned.

      Returns:
      the master name, or "Unknown" if it cannot be determined

    • getThemeName

      public String getThemeName()
      Returns the name of the theme associated with this master.

      This method retrieves the theme name directly. If no theme is associated or an error occurs, null is returned.

      Returns:
      the theme name, or null if not available

    • getLayouts

      public List<PotLayout> getLayouts()
      Returns a list of all slide layouts defined by this master.

      The layouts are wrapped as PotLayout objects. If the master contains no layouts, an empty list is returned.

      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of layouts belonging to this master, never null

    • getLayout

      public PotLayout getLayout(String name)
      Retrieves a specific layout by its name.

      The search is case-sensitive. If no layout with the given name exists, null is returned.

      Parameters:
      name - the name of the layout to find
      Returns:
      the corresponding PotLayout, or null if not found

    • getLayout

      public PotLayout getLayout(org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.SlideLayout type)
      Retrieves a layout by its predefined slide layout type.

      This method uses the Apache POI SlideLayout enumeration to identify the layout. If the master does not contain a layout of the specified type, null is returned.

      Parameters:
      type - the slide layout type to find
      Returns:
      the corresponding PotLayout, or null if not found

    • getLayoutCount

      public int getLayoutCount()
      Returns the number of layouts defined by this master.
      Returns:
      the count of layouts

    • getBackground

      public org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFBackground getBackground()
      Returns the background object of this master.

      The background defines fill color, pattern, or image for slides based on this master. Modifications to the returned object affect all slides using this master, unless overridden at the slide level.

      Returns:
      the Apache POI XSLFBackground object, or null if the master has no background

    • setBackground

      public PotMaster setBackground(PotColor color)
      Sets the background fill color for this master.

      If the master has a background object, its fill color is updated. If color is null, no action is taken. This change propagates to all slides using this master unless they have individual background overrides.

      Parameters:
      color - the new background color
      Returns:
      this PotMaster instance for method chaining

    • getShapes

      public List<org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFShape> getShapes()
      Returns all shapes defined directly on the master slide.

      These shapes are typically placeholders (e.g., title, content) or decorative elements that appear on every slide based on this master. The list is directly from the underlying Apache POI object.

      Returns:
      a list of shapes on the master slide

    • getElementCount

      public int getElementCount()
      Returns the number of shapes defined directly on the master slide.
      Returns:
      the count of shapes

    • getThemeColor

      public PotColor getThemeColor(int index)
      Retrieves a theme color by its index.

      Theme colors are defined in the presentation's theme and are referenced by index (0-11) in slide elements. This method currently returns null as direct access via XSLFTheme.getColor() is not fully supported; future implementations may provide this functionality.

      Parameters:
      index - the color index, typically 0-11
      Returns:
      the theme color, or null if not available

    • getMajorFont

      public String getMajorFont()
      Returns the major (heading) font family defined by the master's theme.

      The major font is used for titles and headings. If the theme is unavailable or an error occurs, null is returned.

      Returns:
      the major font family name, or null

    • getMinorFont

      public String getMinorFont()
      Returns the minor (body) font family defined by the master's theme.

      The minor font is used for body text and content. If the theme is unavailable or an error occurs, null is returned.

      Returns:
      the minor font family name, or null

    • getRawMaster

      public org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFSlideMaster getRawMaster()
      Returns the underlying Apache POI XSLFSlideMaster object.

      This provides direct access to the POI API for advanced operations not covered by this wrapper.

      Returns:
      the raw XSLFSlideMaster

    • getRawTheme

      public org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFTheme getRawTheme()
      Returns the underlying Apache POI XSLFTheme object.

      The theme contains color schemes, font definitions, and other design elements. May be null if the master has no theme.

      Returns:
      the raw XSLFTheme, or null

    • getPresentation

      public PotPresentation getPresentation()
      Returns the parent presentation that contains this master.
      Returns:
      the parent PotPresentation

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this master.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a string containing the master name and layout count

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Compares this master with another object for equality.

      Two PotMaster objects are considered equal if they wrap the same underlying XSLFSlideMaster instance.

      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      o - the object to compare with
      Returns:
      true if the objects are equal, false otherwise

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code based on the underlying XSLFSlideMaster.
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object
      Returns:
      the hash code
